sections.paragraph: a root, ἅπ. λεγόμ. of the same origin and signification as עוּשׁ, pr. to hasten to, especially to give help; hence to succour (Germ. beifpringen), to aid. Arab. غاث Conj. IV. to aid, to succour, to assist. Const. with two accus. (like בִּלְכֵּל Gen 47:12 1Ki 18:4, 13 1Ki 18:13). Isa 50:4, לָעוּת אֶת־יָעֵף דָּבָר “to help the wearied (people) with a word,” to set him up, to confirm him, with words. Aqu. ὑποστηρίσαι. Vulg. sustentare. Hence-
